title: Real-life use of bronchodilators and inhaled corticosteroids in cystic fibrosis and non-CF bronchiectasis, Do guidelines matter?
journal: Journal of cystic fibrosis : official journal of the European Cystic Fibrosis Society

screening.reason: The study focuses on bronchodilators and inhaled corticosteroids in cystic fibrosis and non-CF bronchiectasis, not specifically on inhaled corticosteroids for bronchiectasis.
matched_exclusion_criteria: Studies not matching the review objective.

overall_concept_summary: This study examines real-life usage of bronchodilators and inhaled corticosteroids in cystic fibrosis and non-CF bronchiectasis, questioning whether guidelines are followed.
objective: To assess the real-life use of bronchodilators and inhaled corticosteroids in cystic fibrosis and non-CF bronchiectasis, evaluating adherence to guidelines.
population_or_sample: Patients with cystic fibrosis and non-CF bronchiectasis
comparator: Not specified, compared against guidelines adherence
limitations: Potential bias from retrospective data collection
Limited generalizability due to non-randomized design
missing_information: Abstract is unavailable, making detailed extraction challenging.
